\tzpentry{ID5539}{Emergent Curvature Equatorial Dynamics Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5539 introduces Emergent Curvature Equatorial Dynamics Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \nabla^2\Phi = 4\pi G_{\rm eff}\,\rho(x,t), \end{equation}
